heading: Expiration of dairy farmer indemnity program
label: 4553 Expiration of dairy farmer indemnity program
text: The authority granted under this subchapter shall expire on .September 30, 2023
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 450 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.lSection was enacted as part of , and not as part of the Dairy Production Stabilization Act of 1983 which comprises this chapter.Pub.
